2026-04-24T17:12:52.9562052Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-24T17:12:52.9563104Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-24T17:12:52.9563950Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
